title: Cotylolabium lutzii
taxonomy: Cotylolabium lutzii is a genus of orchids in the family Orchidaceae. It is a monotypic genus, meaning that it only contains one species, C. lutzii. The classification of this plant is within the subtribe Sobraliinae, which is a subfamily of the Orchidaceae family. This subtribe is further divided into several genera, including Cotylolabium. The classification of C. lutzii is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
